title: Horse Trumpet
description: Use a Goat Horn to locate your tamed horse whenever you lose them. A small and simple use for the goat horn.
body:
When you blow into a goat horn, the nearest saddled horse that belongs to you will reveal their location by shouting and glowing for a couple seconds. If you can't see them, you will hear them from up to 1,000 blocks away! Server side only (this is a datapack).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/d3jfGdRASes" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Related:

For more QoL Horse tweaks, check out [Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff) (mod)
